paragraphs.text: JESUS: The five levels are fruits unto holiness, and the end is everlasting life in Heavenly Mount Zion.
Rom 6:22 But now being made free from sin, and become servants to THE ELOHIM, ye have your fruit unto holiness, and the end everlasting life.

They are part of the fruits of the Spirit. My Brides must crucify the flesh with the affections and lusts if they are to be accepted by My FATHER to be part of Heavenly Jerusalem in Heavenly Mount Zion to be His children.

2Co 6:16 And what agreement hath the temple of THE ELOHIM with idols? For ye are the temple of the living ELOHIM; as THE ELOHIM hath said, I will dwell in them, and walk in them; and I will be their ELOHIM, and they shall be my people. 2 Co 6:17 Wherefore come out from among them, and be ye separate, saith THE YAHWEH, and touch not the unclean thing; and I will receive you, 2 Co 6:18 And will be a Father unto you, and ye shall be my sons and daughters, saith THE SHADDAI EL.

Therefore, My FATHER will orchestrate many tribulations for them to crucify their flesh by resisting and subduing the evil spirits that energize them on a daily basis to work all works of adultery, fornication (illicit sexual intercourse like homosexuality, lesbianism, bestiality or extramarital sex), uncleanness (involving the impurity of the heart, mind and body), lasciviousness (unbridled and excess lust), idolatry (loving people and things more than THE YAHWEH), witchcraft (the use of drugs which are influenced by evil spirits that control and deceive their minds), hatred (influenced by hostile spirit), variance (quarrelling), emulation (jealousy), wrath (fierceness), strife (evil plots), seditions (disunity), heresies (denominations, sectarian), envying, murder, drunkenness, reveling (rioting).

If they humble themselves to submit to the discipline of THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT in SHEKINAIH when she exposes the evil spirits that sneaked into their hearts, they will produce the fruits of the Spirit (love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith, meekness and temperance) through her impartation of maturing enablement.

Gal 5:18 But if ye be led of the Spirit, ye are not under the law. Gal 5:19 Now the works of the flesh are manifest, which are these; Adultery, fornication, uncleanness, lasciviousness, Gal 5:20 Idolatry, witchcraft, hatred, variance, emulations, wrath, strife, seditions, heresies, Gal 5:21 Envyings, murders,

drunkenness, revellings, and such like: of the which I tell you before, as I have also told you in time past, that they which do such things shall not inherit the kingdom of THE ELOHIM. Gal 5:22 But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith, Gal 5:23 Meekness, temperance: against such there is no law. Gal 5:24 And they that are Christ have crucified the flesh with the affections and lusts.
Having peace in My FATHER despite His chastisement is accounted as righteousness by Us as Righteousness and Peace are inseparable.
Psa 85:10 Mercy and truth are met together; righteousness and peace have kissed each other.
My righteousness are Peace and Joy in THE HOLY GHOST. It is through maintaining peace and joy in THE HOLY GHOST in tribulations is one imputed as righteous to enter into Our Kingdom.
Mat 6:33 But seek ye first the kingdom of THE ELOHIM, and his righteousness; and all these things shall be added unto you.
Ro 14:17 For the kingdom of THE ELOHIM is not meat and drink; but righteousness, and peace, and joy in the Holy Ghost.
David, would you like to share a dream We gave you concerning this Revelation?
